_comment: Curve ground-truth deployment addresses. Phase B1 registry address-consistency audit oracle. routerNg = Router NG per-chain (14 chains). singletonsEthereum = mainnet protocol singletons. poolInstances/gaugeInstances = the specific pools/gauges the registry currently covers (Curve pools are per-pool instances, not singletons — verified individually via on-chain coins()). Addresses verbatim from 1st-party sources; checksum casing preserved.

curve-router-ng.note: README 14-chain list + Router.vy v1.2.0; on-chain version() cross-checked

curve-js.note: minter / voting_escrow / fee_distributor / gauge_controller + pool/gauge addresses

on-chain.note: Router NG version(), crvUSD Controller collateral_token(), pool coins(), gauge lp_token(), minter token()/controller(), fee_distributor token()/voting_escrow()

routerNg._kind: singleton-per-chain — exchange ABI is NOT uniform: chains marked 4x5 use uint256[4][5] (selector 0xaad348a2/0xf0edc80e), others uint256[5][5] (0xc872a3c5). See PHASE13-CURVE-RESEARCH.md §1.2.

singletonsEthereum._comment: Curve protocol singletons on Ethereum mainnet (chainId 1). crvUSD Controllers verified via collateral_token().

poolInstancesEthereum._comment: Specific Curve pool instances covered by registry. Verified real pools via on-chain coins(). Pools are per-pool — not enumerable as singletons.

crvusd-usdc.note: registry dir 'stableswap-ng' misnames this — symbol crvUSDUSDC-f = legacy Factory plain pool, not NG

crvusd-usdt.note: registry dir 'stableswap-ng' misnames this — symbol crvUSDUSDT-f = legacy Factory plain pool, not NG

gaugeInstancesEthereum._comment: LiquidityGauge instances (one per pool, factory-created). Verified via lp_token().
